adminDocutilUsers.title: DocUtil Users
adminDocutilUsers.subtitle: Manage DocUtil user accounts (list / detail / status toggle / delete) from the AgentHub operator console.
adminDocutilUsers.deleteConfirm: Delete user "{username}"? This action is permanent and cannot be undone.
adminDocutilUsers.deleteConfirmFinal: Are you absolutely sure? This is the final confirmation.

adminDocutilDepartments.title: DocUtil Organization / Departments / Quotas
adminDocutilDepartments.subtitle: Manage DocUtil organization metadata, department tree, and monthly quotas from the AgentHub operator console.
adminDocutilDepartments.selectPrompt: Select a department on the left.
adminDocutilDepartments.parentEditHint: Changing the parent moves this department immediately in the tree.
adminDocutilDepartments.deleteConfirm: Delete department "{name}"? This may be rejected by DocUtil if child departments exist.
adminDocutilDepartments.deleteConfirmFinal: Are you absolutely sure? This is permanent and cannot be undone.
adminDocutilDepartments.quotaModalHint: Change the monthly limit. Used count is updated only by consumption logic and cannot be edited here.
adminDocutilDepartments.quotaInvalid: Monthly limit must be a non-negative integer.

adminDocutilProjects.title: DocUtil Projects / Boards
adminDocutilProjects.subtitle: Manage DocUtil project catalog and boards (permission units) from the AgentHub operator console.
adminDocutilProjects.selectPrompt: Select a project on the left.
adminDocutilProjects.nameTooLong: Name must be 255 characters or less.
adminDocutilProjects.descriptionTooLong: Description must be 2000 characters or less.
adminDocutilProjects.allowOriginalDownloadHint: If enabled, users can download the original file (security consideration). DocUtil default is allow.
adminDocutilProjects.deleteProjectConfirm: Delete project "{name}"? All boards/documents/permissions in this project may be affected.
adminDocutilProjects.deleteProjectConfirmFinal: Are you absolutely sure? This is permanent and cannot be undone.
adminDocutilProjects.deleteBoardConfirmFinal: Are you absolutely sure? This is permanent and cannot be undone.

adminDocutilDashboard.title: DocUtil Dashboard
adminDocutilDashboard.subtitle: Monitor DocUtil operational metrics (KPIs / response time / search stats / upload status) on a single screen.
adminDocutilDashboard.responseTimesEmpty: No response time data for the selected period.
adminDocutilDashboard.searchErrorsEmpty: No search error data for the selected period.
adminDocutilDashboard.errorBoundary: An error occurred while loading data.

adminDocutilAudit.title: DocUtil Audit Log
adminDocutilAudit.subtitle: Browse all operational actions recorded in DocUtil (auth/users/documents/permissions) and export them as CSV.
adminDocutilAudit.empty: No audit log entries to display.
adminDocutilAudit.errorBoundary: An error occurred while loading the audit log.
adminDocutilAudit.errorExportBoundary: An error occurred while exporting CSV.

adminDocutilSearchScopes.title: DocUtil Search Scopes
adminDocutilSearchScopes.subtitle: Define RAG search scopes per project/board/folder and manage feature toggles (Chatbot/Q&A/Keyword/Agent) and tuning parameters.
adminDocutilSearchScopes.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete the scope "{name}"? This cannot be undone and may affect RAG behavior.
adminDocutilSearchScopes.empty: No search scopes registered yet. Create one to get started.
adminDocutilSearchScopes.locationsSubtitle: Locations available to assign to a search scope (read-only).
adminDocutilSearchScopes.locationsEmpty: No locations of the selected type.
adminDocutilSearchScopes.optionsSubtitle: Search scope identifiers usable from embed/external systems (read-only).
adminDocutilSearchScopes.errorBoundary: An error occurred while loading search scopes.
adminDocutilSearchScopes.validationSimilarity: Similarity threshold must be in 0-1 range.

adminDocutilEvaluation.title: DocUtil Evaluation
adminDocutilEvaluation.subtitle: Evaluate RAG response quality across 4 metrics (context relevancy / answer faithfulness / answer relevancy / hallucination) and monitor trends.
adminDocutilEvaluation.configSubtitle: Adjust each metric's weight in 0-1 range. Recommended sum = 1.0.
adminDocutilEvaluation.runSubtitle: Triggers a judge LLM call for evaluation. May incur cost — use with care.
adminDocutilEvaluation.runQuestionPlaceholder: One question per line (max 100, 2000 chars each)
adminDocutilEvaluation.trendSubtitle: Daily averages over the last N days.
adminDocutilEvaluation.logsSubtitle: Detailed Q&A pairs and per-metric scores for each evaluation run.
adminDocutilEvaluation.errorBoundary: An error occurred while loading evaluation data.
adminDocutilEvaluation.errorRunBoundary: An error occurred while running evaluation.
adminDocutilEvaluation.validationQuestionLength: Question must be 2000 characters or fewer.

adminDocutilFaq.title: DocUtil FAQ
adminDocutilFaq.subtitle: Manage DocUtil FAQ entries from the operator console.
adminDocutilFaq.questionPlaceholder: Enter a question frequently asked by users.
adminDocutilFaq.confirmDelete: Delete this FAQ? This cannot be undone.
adminDocutilFaq.validationQuestionLength: Question must be 2000 characters or fewer.
adminDocutilFaq.validationCategoryLength: Category must be 128 characters or fewer.
adminDocutilFaq.errorBoundary: An error occurred while loading FAQ data.

adminDocutilReports.title: DocUtil Reports
adminDocutilReports.subtitle: Manage DocUtil report generation/history and templates from the operator console.
adminDocutilReports.fieldGenerationParamsHint: JSON object. Leave empty for defaults.
adminDocutilReports.downloadNotReady: Report is not ready or unavailable.
adminDocutilReports.confirmDeleteReport: Delete this report? This cannot be undone.
adminDocutilReports.confirmDeleteTemplate: Delete this template? Existing reports are unaffected.
adminDocutilReports.validationDescriptionLength: Description must be 2000 characters or fewer.
adminDocutilReports.validationGenerationParamsJson: Generation params is not a valid JSON object.
adminDocutilReports.errorBoundary: An error occurred while loading report data.

adminKb.title: Knowledge Base Administration
adminKb.subtitle: Manage documents in the DocUtil knowledge base from the operator console.
adminKb.uploadSubtitle: Add a document to the knowledge base. Indexing runs asynchronously after upload.
adminKb.uploadSuccess: Document uploaded. Returning to the list shortly.
adminKb.dropzoneTitle: Drag and drop a file here or click to browse
adminKb.dropzoneHint: Supports PDF, DOCX, XLSX, TXT, CSV, HWP, PPTX.
adminKb.folderIdDesc: DocUtil collection or folder identifier. Leave blank to upload to the global scope.
adminKb.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.
adminKb.chunksEmpty: No chunks have been generated yet.
adminKb.detailSubtitle: View metadata and chunk indexing results.
adminKb.notFound: The document could not be found.

adminRagMetrics.title: RAG Metrics
adminRagMetrics.subtitle: Real-time view of Query Rewriter cache, DocUtil search cache, and RAG pipeline statistics.
adminRagMetrics.errorGeneric: An error occurred while loading metrics.
adminRagMetrics.authErrorBody: This page requires Admin or SuperAdmin role. Please contact your administrator.

notes.ragInvocations: RagService delegation entries (excludes RagService result-cache hits)
notes.ragZeroResults: Times DocUtil search returned an empty result
notes.distinctChunks: Cumulative distinct chunks after RRF dedup

agentBuilder.advancedSettingsDescription: Operator-only settings including LLM routing, knowledge base source, and consumer whitelist.

fields.llmRoutingHelp: External (OpenAI/Claude/Gemini), Internal (Nexus, LAN-only), or policy-based dispatch (Hybrid).
fields.routingPolicyJsonHelp: Decision rules for Hybrid mode. Leave blank to use the default policy (PII routes Internal, otherwise External).
fields.knowledgeBaseSourceHelp: ADR-2: DocUtil is the single source of truth. AgentHub built-in KB is deprecated; new agents should use DocUtil.
fields.knowledgeBaseRefHelp: DocUtil collection identifier. Leave blank for global (full-corpus) search. Future iteration will replace this with a dropdown sourced from the operator console.
fields.knowledgeBaseRefDropdownHelp: Choose a DocUtil collection from the dropdown. Leave blank for global (full-corpus) search.
fields.consumerSystemsHelp: JSON array of End-User App IDs allowed to invoke this agent. Leave blank to allow any system.
fields.sortOrderHelp: Display order within the same category. Higher values appear first. Default 0.

agentBuilder.knowledgeBaseRefLoadFailed: Could not load DocUtil collections. Enter the ID manually.
agentBuilder.knowledgeBaseRefEmpty: No collections registered. Create one in the DocUtil console first.

errors.consumerSystemsInvalid: Not a valid JSON array of strings.

adminDocutilTemplates.title: DocUtil Document Templates
adminDocutilTemplates.subtitle: Operator management of Jinja2-based document generation templates (file upload, AI auto-fill, variable mapping, etc.)
adminDocutilTemplates.fieldFileHelp: DOCX / PPTX — used for Jinja2 variable extraction or AI auto-conversion.
adminDocutilTemplates.variablesHint: Edit and save Jinja2 variable metadata (label/type/required/category).
adminDocutilTemplates.variablesEmpty: No Jinja2 variables extracted. Upload a file or apply a mapping first.
adminDocutilTemplates.structureHint: Displays the source DOCX paragraph/table structure and existing variables as JSON. Use as reference when designing variable mappings.
adminDocutilTemplates.autoFillHint: Specify source documents to let AI auto-generate variable values.
adminDocutilTemplates.autoFillSourceIdsPlaceholder: Separate UUIDs by comma or newline
adminDocutilTemplates.convertHint: Apply AI analysis result ai_analysis to convert the original document into a Jinja2 template.
adminDocutilTemplates.mappingHint: Apply cell/paragraph → variable mappings from the editor to the source DOCX to insert {{ variable }} placeholders.
adminDocutilTemplates.mappingJsonHelp: Each entry requires locationType (table_cell/paragraph) + index fields + variableName.
adminDocutilTemplates.uploadStandardHint: Automatically extracts {{ }} variables from the DOCX/PPTX file.
adminDocutilTemplates.uploadBlankTitle: Upload Blank Form (AI Auto Jinja2 Conversion)
adminDocutilTemplates.uploadBlankHint: AI analyzes blank tables/paragraphs and automatically inserts Jinja2 variables.
adminDocutilTemplates.uploadSmartHint: Automatically selects standard or blank-form path based on presence of {{ }} patterns. Name/type may be omitted.
adminDocutilTemplates.previewUnavailable: No uploaded file is available for preview.
adminDocutilTemplates.validationNameLength: Template name must be 255 characters or less.
adminDocutilTemplates.validationDescriptionLength: Description must be 2000 characters or less.
adminDocutilTemplates.validationSamplePromptLength: Sample prompt must be 5000 characters or less.
adminDocutilTemplates.validationAutoFillIds: Enter at least one source document ID.
adminDocutilTemplates.validationConvertJson: ai_analysis is not a valid JSON object.
adminDocutilTemplates.validationMappingJson: Mappings is not a valid non-empty JSON array.
adminDocutilTemplates.noStorageWarning: This template has no original file uploaded — convert and mapping cannot be applied. Upload a file via standard/blank/smart upload first.
adminDocutilTemplates.noStorageTooltip: Available after uploading the source file
adminDocutilTemplates.errorBoundary: An error occurred while loading DocUtil document templates.
adminDocutilTemplates.errorUnknown: An error occurred while processing the request.

adminDocutilApiKeys.title: DocUtil LLM API Keys
adminDocutilApiKeys.subtitle: Register, revoke and verify external LLM provider API keys (OpenAI / Anthropic / Gemini, etc.) from the operator console.
adminDocutilApiKeys.warningPlainKey: ⚠ The plain-text key is sent only at registration and immediately encrypted/discarded. Only the masked prefix is returned in subsequent reads.
adminDocutilApiKeys.warningAdminOnly: This console is for Admin / SuperAdmin only.
adminDocutilApiKeys.createHint: The plain key is transmitted only once at submission. Back it up safely — it cannot be retrieved later.
adminDocutilApiKeys.fieldApiKeyPlaceholder: sk-... or the raw key issued by the provider
adminDocutilApiKeys.validationLlmNameLength: Provider name must be 64 characters or fewer.
adminDocutilApiKeys.validationApiKeyLength: Plain API key is too long.
adminDocutilApiKeys.errorBoundary: An error occurred while loading DocUtil API keys.
adminDocutilApiKeys.errorUnknown: An error occurred while processing the request.

adminDocutilDocAgents.title: DocUtil Agents (chatbot personas)
adminDocutilDocAgents.subtitle: DocUtil chatbot personas — a separate domain from AgentHub Agents. (Personas for chatbot / report / proposal / minutes)
adminDocutilDocAgents.warningSeparateDomain: ℹ The "Agent" on this screen refers to DocUtil's chatbot persona (system_prompt / temperature / max_tokens). AgentHub's routing/RAG host Agent is managed separately from the "Agents" menu.
adminDocutilDocAgents.fieldAgentTypeHelp: Free-form (≤ 20 chars). e.g. chatbot / report / proposal / minutes.
adminDocutilDocAgents.fieldLlmProviderHelp: openai / azure_openai / gemini / anthropic. Leave empty to use system default.
adminDocutilDocAgents.validationNameLength: Agent name must be 255 characters or fewer.
adminDocutilDocAgents.validationDescriptionLength: Description must be 2000 characters or fewer.
adminDocutilDocAgents.validationAgentTypeLength: Agent type must be 20 characters or fewer.
adminDocutilDocAgents.validationLlmProviderLength: LLM provider must be 50 characters or fewer.
adminDocutilDocAgents.validationLlmModelLength: LLM model must be 255 characters or fewer.
adminDocutilDocAgents.errorBoundary: An error occurred while loading DocUtil agents.
adminDocutilDocAgents.errorUnknown: An error occurred while processing the request.

adminDocutilDocumentsV2.title: DocUtil Documents V2 (Designer Workflow)
adminDocutilDocumentsV2.subtitle: Phase 4 designer-based document workflow. 22-component discriminated union for free generation + partial patch + async export.
adminDocutilDocumentsV2.warningSeparateDomain: ℹ This workflow is the successor to the Jinja2-based Report Templates. The two domains are managed separately.
adminDocutilDocumentsV2.createTitle: Generate New Document V2 (Free Generation, Mode A)
adminDocutilDocumentsV2.createHint: Prompt + RAG source document IDs + designer tokens are combined into LLM Structured Outputs to produce DocumentSchema.
adminDocutilDocumentsV2.fieldPromptHelp: e.g. "3-slide report on Q1 revenue with KPI cards and a line chart"
adminDocutilDocumentsV2.fieldDocumentTypeHelp: One of slide_report / docx_report / proposal / minutes / one_pager / weekly_status / freeform_doc.
adminDocutilDocumentsV2.fieldModeHelp: Only free_generation is currently supported (template_fill awaits DocUtil-side D8 activation).
adminDocutilDocumentsV2.fieldAgentIdHelp: UUID issued from the DocUtil Agents menu. Empty = system default prompt only.
adminDocutilDocumentsV2.patchHint: patch_type: page (replace entire page) / component (merge fields) / tokens (replace designer tokens)
adminDocutilDocumentsV2.fieldExpectedVersionHelp: Must match the current schema_version to apply. Empty = no lock.
adminDocutilDocumentsV2.exportHint: DocUtil's Celery worker builds the file in the background. Status polling is required after submission.
adminDocutilDocumentsV2.fieldExportFormatHelp: pptx / docx / hwpx / pdf / html. (pptx is most stable in S2 scope.)
adminDocutilDocumentsV2.exportStatusHint: Enter job_id to poll status. Download is available when status=completed.
adminDocutilDocumentsV2.fieldJobIdPlaceholder: The UUID returned from the export request
adminDocutilDocumentsV2.validationPromptLength: Prompt must be 8000 characters or fewer.
adminDocutilDocumentsV2.validationTemplateFill: This operator console supports only free_generation.
adminDocutilDocumentsV2.validationDesignTokensJson: design_tokens is not a valid JSON object.
adminDocutilDocumentsV2.validationPatchType: patch_type must be one of page / component / tokens.
adminDocutilDocumentsV2.validationComponentIdRequired: patch_type=component requires both page_id and component_id.
adminDocutilDocumentsV2.validationTokensNoIdentifier: patch_type=tokens must not specify page_id / component_id.
adminDocutilDocumentsV2.validationPatchDataJson: data is not a valid JSON object.
adminDocutilDocumentsV2.validationExportFormat: Unsupported format. (allowed: pptx, docx, hwpx, pdf, html)
adminDocutilDocumentsV2.errorBoundary: An error occurred while loading DocUtil Documents V2.
adminDocutilDocumentsV2.errorUnknown: An error occurred while processing the request.

dashboard.subtitle: Get a quick overview of your AI management system
dashboard.adminOnlyActivities: Administrator privileges are required to view recent activities.

list.empty: No provider LLM keys registered. Click + Register New Provider Key to add one.

modal.apiKeyHint: The key is encrypted at rest with AES-GCM. The plaintext is discarded immediately after submission.

provider.confirmDelete: Delete provider LLM key "{name}"? It will be removed from the pool immediately.
